activities_projects.title: Critical Analysis of the Chapter
activities_projects.objective: Analyze the central ideas and themes in the chapter
steps: Read both parts of the chapter carefully
Identify the themes of determination, dedication and passion for music
Write a detailed explanation of these themes in 12–15 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops analytical thinking and critical writing
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and clarity (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Character Essay
activities_projects.objective: Analyze similarities and differences between Evelyn Glennie and Bismillah Khan
steps: Write an essay comparing the struggles faced by both musicians
Explain how each of them achieved success
Support your ideas with examples from the chapter
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances character analysis and essay writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of comparison and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Music and Culture Research
activities_projects.objective: Understand the cultural importance of music
steps: Research the history of the shehnai in Indian culture
Find out where and when it is traditionally played
Write a report of 10–12 sentences

activities_projects.title: Technological vs Traditional Learning
activities_projects.objective: Analyze different ways of learning music
steps: Write how Evelyn Glennie learned music despite her disability
Compare it with modern technological learning methods
Write your opinion in 10–12 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Encourages analytical thinking about learning methods

activities_projects.title: Creative Biography Writing
steps: Write a short biography of Bismillah Khan
Include his childhood, achievements and contribution to music
Write at least 12–15 sentences

activities_projects.title: Theme Exploration Activity
steps: Identify events showing Evelyn Glennie’s determination
Explain how she overcame her hearing disability
Write your explanation in 8–10 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands values of perseverance and dedication

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Creation
steps: Imagine a conversation between a music student and Bismillah Khan
Write at least 12 lines of dialogue
Include questions about practice, dedication and success

activities_projects.title: Literary Elements Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify literary elements used in the chapter
steps: Identify the setting, characters and key events
Explain how the author presents the achievements of the musicians
Write your explanation in 8–10 sentences

activities_projects.title: Music Awareness Campaign
steps: Design a poster promoting the importance of music education
Include images of instruments like the shehnai
Write a short message encouraging students to learn music

activities_projects.title: Reflective Writing
activities_projects.objective: Reflect on the importance of dedication in life
steps: Think about the struggles faced by Evelyn Glennie and Bismillah Khan
Relate their dedication to your own learning experience
Write a reflection in 10–12 sentences
